violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door low boy. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The mobile cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026
The ceiling by the back three bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No Food Safety Manager was present during time of inspection. Establishment must have Food Safety Manger present, when food is being prepared, handled, or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Staff removed the utensils from stagnant water to wash, rinse, and sanitize during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the back prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. -Shelving shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2024

Ice buildup observed in the walk-in freezer. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Ice buildup shall be broken down to prevent blockage of cold air flow in the walk-in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024

The walls in the back food prep area and walls in the front hand-washing sink area are constructed of sheet rock. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. -Walls shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
